animalism.name: Feral Whispers
animalism.description: Communicate with an animal via sustained eye contact; create a two-way empathic link.

animalism.name: Obedience
animalism.dice: Presence + Animal Ken + Animalism – animal's Composure
animalism.description: Command an animal to obey a single order to the best of its ability.

animalism.name: Call of the Wild
animalism.description: Summon all animals of one type within 100 yards per success to your location.

animalism.name: Subsume the Lesser Spirit
animalism.dice: Manipulation + Animal Ken + Animalism vs Composure + Blood Potency
animalism.description: Possess an animal's body; your own body falls into a torpor-like state.

animalism.name: Leashing the Beast
animalism.dice: Manipulation + Empathy + Animalism vs Composure + Blood Potency
animalism.description: Trigger or suppress vampiric frenzy in yourself or another Kindred within line of sight.

auspex.name: Heightened Senses
auspex.description: All senses sharpen to supernatural acuity; see in complete darkness and detect minute details at range.

auspex.name: Aura Perception
auspex.description: Read the emotional aura of a target, revealing their mood, supernatural nature, and any deception.

auspex.name: The Spirit's Touch
auspex.description: Gain psychic impressions from an object by touching it; sense its history and the emotions of those who handled it.

auspex.name: Telepathy
auspex.description: Read the surface thoughts of a target within sight.

auspex.name: Twilight Projection
auspex.description: Project an astral form that can move freely and perceive the world; physical body falls into a sleep-like state.

celerity.name: Celerity (Passive)
celerity.description: Each dot subtracts from attackers' dice pools and adds to your Initiative and Speed while active.

dominate.name: Command
dominate.dice: Intelligence + Intimidation + Dominate vs Resolve + Blood Potency
dominate.description: Issue a single-word verbal command via eye contact; the subject must obey immediately and instinctively.

dominate.name: Mesmerize
dominate.dice: Intelligence + Expression + Dominate vs Resolve + Blood Potency
dominate.description: Place the subject in a hypnotic state and implant a complex suggestion or command that activates later.

dominate.name: The Forgetful Mind
dominate.description: Alter or erase specific memories from a subject's mind and optionally replace them with fabrications.

dominate.name: Conditioning
dominate.dice: Wits + Subterfuge + Dominate vs Resolve + Blood Potency
dominate.description: Slowly break down a subject's resistance over weeks of repeated sessions, making them highly suggestible.

dominate.name: Possession
dominate.description: Possess a mortal's body entirely, controlling it while your own lies dormant.

majesty.name: Awe
majesty.description: Radiate overwhelming charisma; successes add bonus dice to your subsequent social actions for the scene.

majesty.name: Revelation
majesty.dice: Manipulation + Persuasion + Majesty vs Composure + Blood Potency
majesty.description: Compel a target to confess their deepest secrets.

majesty.name: Entrancement
majesty.dice: Manipulation + Empathy + Majesty vs Composure + Blood Potency
majesty.description: Make a target deeply devoted and enamored of you, willing to serve your interests.

majesty.name: Summoning
majesty.dice: Manipulation + Persuasion + Majesty vs Composure + Blood Potency
majesty.description: Compel a known individual to travel directly to your location, regardless of distance.

majesty.name: Sovereignty
majesty.dice: Presence + Intimidation + Majesty vs Composure + Blood Potency
majesty.description: Project absolute authority; any attempt to attack, criticize, or oppose you requires a contested roll.

nightmare.name: Monstrous Countenance
nightmare.dice: Presence + Intimidation + Nightmare vs Composure + Blood Potency
nightmare.description: Reveal the terrifying face of your Beast; subjects who fail flee in panic for the rest of the scene.

nightmare.name: Dread
nightmare.dice: Manipulation + Empathy + Nightmare vs Composure + Blood Potency
nightmare.description: Emanate an aura of rising existential panic that affects all those near you.

nightmare.name: Eye of the Beast
nightmare.dice: Presence + Empathy + Nightmare vs Composure + Blood Potency
nightmare.description: Paralyze a mortal with primal animal terror via direct eye contact; the victim cannot move or act.

nightmare.name: Shatter the Mind
nightmare.dice: Manipulation + Empathy + Nightmare vs Composure + Blood Potency
nightmare.description: Confront a victim with their deepest fear made manifest, inflicting a temporary derangement.

nightmare.name: Mortal Fear
nightmare.description: Weaponize terror itself: each success inflicts 1 lethal damage. Can only be used once per scene per target.

obfuscate.name: Touch of Shadow
obfuscate.description: Conceal a single specific object; observers cannot perceive it unless they actively search for that exact item.

obfuscate.name: Mask of Tranquility
obfuscate.description: Suppress your Predator's Taint; other Kindred do not instinctively react to you as undead.

obfuscate.name: Cloak of Night
obfuscate.description: Vanish completely from sight; witnesses unconsciously reconstruct their memory to explain your disappearance.

obfuscate.name: The Familiar Stranger
obfuscate.dice: Wits + Subterfuge + Obfuscate vs Resolve + Blood Potency
obfuscate.description: Appear as whomever the subject most expects to see; you take on that person's aspect in their mind.

obfuscate.name: Cloak of the Gathering
obfuscate.description: Extend your Obfuscate to conceal others; hide one additional person per Obfuscate dot beyond yourself.

protean.name: Aspect of the Predator
protean.description: Project a supernatural predatory mien; if your Blood Potency is lower than an unknown Kindred's, treat it as equal.

protean.name: Haven of Soil
protean.description: Merge your body into natural earth; immune to sunlight and physical attack while interred.

protean.name: Claws of the Wild
protean.description: Grow fearsome natural claws; +1 to unarmed attack pools, inflict aggravated damage, +2 to climbing rolls.

protean.name: Shape of the Beast
protean.description: Transform into a bat or wolf; retain your mind and Disciplines while gaining animal physical traits.

protean.name: Body of Spirit
protean.description: Transform into a fine mist; immune to physical attacks, float at normal Speed, pass through any gap.

resilience.name: Resilience (Passive)
resilience.description: Each dot adds 1 Stamina and 1 Health for the scene, and downgrades a number of aggravated damage points equal to your Resilience rating.

vigor.name: Vigor (Passive)
vigor.description: Each dot adds 1 Strength for the scene, increasing melee damage and derived traits such as Speed and carrying capacity.

cruac.name: Level One Rituals
cruac.description: Pangs of Proserpina (inflict intense hunger on a target), Rigor Mortis (immobilize a Kindred). Your Crúac dots = max ritual level you may learn.

cruac.name: Level Two Rituals
cruac.description: Cheval (ride another's senses remotely), The Hydra's Vitae (transform your blood into lethal poison).

cruac.name: Level Three Rituals
cruac.description: Deflection of Wooden Doom (protection from staking), Touch of the Morrigan (channel lethal force through touch).

cruac.name: Level Four Rituals
cruac.description: Blood Price (steal a share of a target's Vitae when they feed), Willful Vitae (immunity to Vinculum from one feeding).

cruac.name: Level Five Rituals
cruac.description: Blood Blight (taint blood to inflict lethal damage), Feeding the Crone (transform into a savage feeding maw).

theban_sorcery.name: Level One Rituals
theban_sorcery.description: Blood Scourge (conjure a whip of vitae), Vitae Reliquary (store Vitae in an object for later use). Your Theban Sorcery dots = max ritual level you may learn.

theban_sorcery.name: Level Two Rituals
theban_sorcery.description: Curse of Babel (render a victim unable to communicate coherently), Liar's Plague (lies cause beetles to swarm from the liar's mouth).

theban_sorcery.name: Level Three Rituals
theban_sorcery.description: Blandishment of Sin (upgrade severity of target's next injury), Malediction of Despair (curse a specific action to fail).

theban_sorcery.name: Level Four Rituals
theban_sorcery.description: Gift of Lazarus (reanimate a corpse as a zombie servant), Stigmata (victim bleeds from the five wounds of Christ).

theban_sorcery.name: Level Five Rituals
theban_sorcery.description: Transubstantiation (transform one substance into another), Wrathful Judgment (channel divine fire through the target's blood).
